case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. GROLEAU, SYLVIE AKA SYLVIE STEWART

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT GROLEAU, SYLVIE AKA SYLVIE STEWART SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GROLEAU, SYLVIE AKA SYLVIE STEWART

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROLEAU, SYLVIE AKA SYLVIE STEWART THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 642 JONES ST. #606, S.F. CA $1,480.05 RENT, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,576.05, LEASE FORFEITED, A WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, BUT DEFT. SHALL NOT BE EVICTED PRIOR TO 9/26/00. IN THE EVENT DEFT. VACATE THE PREMISES & TURN IN THE KEYS TO HOTEL MANAGER BY 12:00 NOON ON 9/26/00, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH... NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
